text.title: Lessons Learned Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Lessons written but never queried on new projects.
antipattern.root-cause: no retrieval log per new project

antipattern.symptom: Lesson reads like a war story, no generalisable insight.
